title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Pfizer India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Pfizer India
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!
